document.title: 1320 S0 Void Gate Content Asset Database v2 EN
document.module: S0 Void Gate / 空性之门
document.purpose: Standalone S0 Void Gate content asset database for NOVA lookup and Awareness Layer report rendering.

positioning.module_function: S0 Void Gate reflects the core illusion, void threshold, or inner misidentification the user is invited to observe and integrate.
positioning.important_boundary: S0 is not a fate gate, karmic sentence, fixed flaw, prediction, diagnosis, or spiritual status. It is a symbolic mirror for awareness.

calculation_dependency.zero_rule: Keep 0 as S0-00. Do not convert to S0-20.

nova_rendering_rule.lookup_behavior: NOVA calculates S0, looks up the matching S0-XX entry, and renders the approved fields.
allowed_generation: Short bridge sentence from Positioning Disclaimer to S0 section.
Brief integration summary using retrieved content only.
must_not_generate: Do not create a new S0 meaning from scratch.
Do not call S0 a destiny, curse, karmic punishment, diagnosis, or fixed identity.
Do not tell the user what major life decision to make based on S0.

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Stabilize presence and practice “doing nothing.”
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Everything must be obtained from the outside world.
content.void_challenge: Unable to stop, continuously seeking confirmation.
content.void_power: The ability to return completely to the inner center.
content.path_of_return: Stabilize presence and practice “doing nothing.”
content.wisewave_guidance: The more you let go, the closer you come to truth.

content.name: Void Gate
content.reflection_question: What core illusion am I invited to see through?
content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Practice not proving yourself.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”
content.safe_language_note: This interpretation is symbolic and reflective. It is not predictive, diagnostic, deterministic, medical, legal, financial, or religious advice, and it does not define a fixed identity.
content.core_illusion: Feeling that you are not good enough or not valuable enough.
content.void_power: Deep self-affirmation.
content.path_of_return: Practice not proving yourself.
content.wisewave_guidance: You are already enough; you do not need to be proven.

content.name: Void Gate

content.reflective_summary: This Void Gate reflects the illusion of: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.. It invites the user to observe where this belief may shape perception, reactions, and self-protection without treating it as fate or fixed identity.
content.integration_key: The integration begins through: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
content.one_week_practice: For one week, pause once a day and ask: “Where did this illusion appear today, and what would feel more true, grounded, and kind?”

content.core_illusion: Believing everything must be controlled in order to feel safe.
content.void_power: The power of letting go and flowing with life.
content.path_of_return: Practice allowing things to unfold naturally.
content.wisewave_guidance: Control is a reaction of fear; trust is true strength.
